sharedStateObservations.description: Worker reports are persisted to workers/{featureId}/report.json with timestamp and agent info
Report parsing supports both inline JSON strings and @file.json path references
Feature state transitions: pending -> in_progress -> in_review -> completed|blocked, with retry paths from blocked/in_review back to pending

notes: Feature list and update commands fully implemented
Proper filtering by mission, milestone, and status
Worker report persistence with proper JSON parsing
Report preservation on retry when no replacement provided
Integration tests verify all functionality including edge cases
